declared_stress_contraction_law.law: each defect moves along the H3 tangent-chart pair direction by coupling/(1+(d/R_s)^2)

claim_boundary: Controlled/planted two-defect stress-contraction assay. A positive diagnostic receipt means the declared readout-contraction rule drives inverse defect-like packets together in H3 and beats no-contraction/shuffled controls. It is not spontaneous particle formation, production gravity, a physical quantum-vacuum simulation, or a CMB/matter prediction.
